titles.title: Our Whole Purpose in Being Here

properties.verseOrder: C1 V2 C1 V3 C1 V4

verse.name: C1
verse.lines: Our whole purpose in being here, Is to spread the good news, Our whole purpose in being here is to shine, And as the moon reflects the sun, We reflect the Son of God, Our whole purpose in being here is to shine.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: He made the stars in every galaxy, The Sun and the Moon proclaim His glory, They all have a purpose, they were meant to be, The Sun each day is shining so bright, And the Moon reflects the light in Night.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: A lot of times we wonder why we came to be, Our purpose in life seems such a mystery, but we're all part of God's economy, The son of God is shining so bright and we reflect the light in the night.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: And as the moon reflects the sun, We reflect the Son of God, Our whole purpose in being here is to shine.
